hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this remote server.
hints.threads: Number of remote servers to check in parallel.
hints.label: Display name shown in the UI. Falls back to the item key if empty.
hints.host: IP address or hostname of the remote server. If empty, the item key is used as the host.
hints.port: SSH port of the remote server. Leave blank to use the default port (22).
hints.password: SSH password. Leave blank if authenticating with a key file.
hints.key_file: Path to the SSH private key file for authentication.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new server name or identifier:
